items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (PHP Object Injection)
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento extension, which can lead to remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: This Adobe Security Bulletin addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, which could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw in Magento's REST API, named PolyShell, that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files disguised as images, bypassing validation and potentially leading to system compromise.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This critical security update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source addresses multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls, gain escalated privileges, execute unauthorized malicious code, and compromise store data.
